Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction By Specially Appearing Defendant Mikhail Michael Egorov; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Nima H. Mohebbi, Esq., Ward Penfold, LATHAM & WATKINS LLP, 424.653.5500, nima.mohebbi@lw.com, ward.penfold@lw.com for Plaintiffs PARAFI DIGITAL OPPORTUNITIES LP, FRAMEWORK VENTURES L.P., and 1KX LP (In-person)
Michael Fluhr, Esq., DLA PIPER LLP, 415.836.2500, michael.fluhr@us.dlapiper.com for Defendant Mikhail "Michael" Egorov, (via ZOOM)
Ryan Wheeler, CSR #13717, 760-805-3974, ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com, Court reporter, (via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MIKHAIL EGOROV'S Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction By Specially Appearing Defendant Mikhail Michael Egorov

Defendant Egorov's motion to quash is granted.

Plaintiffs' request for jurisdictional discovery is denied.

*SEE WORD MINUTES AND SINGED ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS*

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Ryan Wheeler, CSR #13717, 760-805-3974, ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Not ARGUED. Not Contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MIKHAIL EGOROV'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint For Forum Non Conveniens.

The motion to dismiss based on forum nonconveniens is off calendar as moot.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Ryan Wheeler, CSR #13717, 760-805-3974, ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
